---
title: "Bloomberg Terminal"
page-layout: article
---

# Bloomberg Terminal

**Provider:** Bloomberg

## Description

Professional financial data platform providing real-time market data, company information, economic indicators, analytics, and news. Widely used for investment, finance, and economic research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events
- **Access model:** Workstation Access, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events

## Access notes

Available on dedicated workstations located at Marx Library and the School of Management.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://guides.library.yale.edu/Bloomberg)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
